Transcrição Completa: What Are The Core Services To Offer

 

[00:00] [música]

 

[00:02] There is a brevity meaning an array a wide selection of choices that you could make in what you want to sell that's a digital service to businesses. You could either specialize in just one of these services towards one industry. Maybe you take one of these services and do it for any industry.

 

[00:25] Maybe you take a batch of these services and you focus on one industry or you know you just take these services and do it for anybody you can do it for. It's completely up to you of course for whatever route that you want to take.

 

[00:40] I just want to bring to your awareness all the different digital services that you could become aware of, train your staff on, hire for, outsource for, and also just want to make you aware of the costs that kind of fluctuate in between these different services so you might be able to take a route that's going to best financially supplement you and your agency.

 

[01:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Graphic Design & Creative Services

 

NÚMEROS: Não aplicável

 

VISUAL: Categoria de serviços criativos destacada, ícones representando design gráfico, possíveis exemplos visuais de produtos: business cards, websites, YouTube thumbnails

 

[01:08] So you, for example, maybe you're a graphic designer, you got some Photoshop skills. That could be a graphic design in a creative agency where you potentially specialize in business cards, websites, uh revamping people's YouTube thumbnails, could be an entire business by itself, as an example.

 

[01:30] There's so many different things you could do with a graphic designer and a graphic design position. You could create ads with a graphic designer. You could use these different skills in-house for the different services I'm going to name that go alongside this.

 

[01:45] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Video Production & Editing

 

NÚMEROS: Não aplicável

 

VISUAL: Categoria de edição de vídeo, logos ou ícones de softwares: Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro X, Adobe Illustrator, After Effects

 

[01:48] You could be a video editor, somebody that's got skills in Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro X, Adobe Illustrator, After Effects, etc. Somebody in that position, they could have their own video agency, production agency, if you will. They could also participate in an agency with multiple skills a part of it.

 

[02:10] But when you're a video editor, I want to be clear, especially as a graphic designer and some of these different skills, you're going to be limited based on the time that's involved. Because if it's just you, you're going to be limited once again to how many clients you could take on unless you've built up your outsource network properly and people that you can have uh handle the work that you're going to be taking on as a video production guy. Okay?

 

[02:38] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Paid Advertising Platforms

 

NÚMEROS: Múltiplas plataformas mencionadas (6+ canais diferentes)

 

VISUAL: Grid ou lista de plataformas de anúncios pagos: Pinterest, LinkedIn, Google AdWords, Google Display Network, Google PPC, YouTube, Facebook, Instagram - ícones de cada plataforma

 

[02:40] There's advertisers. Maybe you specialize just in one of these channels or in all of them. You got Pinterest, LinkedIn, Google AdWords, which controls Google Display Network, Google PPC, which is the search network, and you got YouTube on there as well. You got Facebook, which has Facebook and Instagram. LinkedIn can be a platform in itself that you could specialize in for paid.

 

[03:10] All of what I just said, you can also specialize in for organic, meaning you could be a social media manager or a social media marketer, whatever you want to call yourself, where you're just creating content and then posting it.

 

[03:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Social Media Management - Specialized Roles

 

NÚMEROS: Não aplicável

 

VISUAL: Quebra de funções dentro de social media: criação de conteúdo, postagem, relatórios e dados, análise - representação visual de diferentes papéis especializados

 

[03:28] There's even agencies now that are just doing the piecemeal things a part of those processes. There's people who are just focusing on reporting and data. There's people who are just focusing on creating the content for somebody else to then post. Obviously, that person being the person who's just posts. There's all kinds of different roles.

 

[03:50] But you always want to remember the revenue roles are the duties and services that'll get you paid more, that'll have more opportunity in them as well, that'll likely take a lot less time and effort than some of the things that obviously are more time and effort intensive.

 

[04:10] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Revenue Roles vs Time-Intensive Roles

 

NÚMEROS: Não aplicável

 

VISUAL: Comparação visual entre papéis de alta receita (menos tempo, mais resultado) vs papéis intensivos em tempo (mais esforço, limitações), possivelmente com setas ou gráfico comparativo

 

[04:12] So, as an example, advertising, that can be a skill that does not take a lot of time, that's very result driven, that can have rewards on top of it, that's not going to strain the time and effort of you or your staff.

 

[04:30] Whereas, let's say you're in a skill where you're a photographer, okay? Every client you got to take on, maybe you're going out and you're physically taking photos on site, you're going to be limited based on location alone in that example, but you can still represent yourself as a digital agency. There's all kinds of different stuff.

 

[04:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Additional Digital Services

 

NÚMEROS: Não aplicável

 

VISUAL: Lista expandida de serviços: Email Marketing, Marketing Automation, Data Science, Photography - ícones representando cada categoria

 

[04:52] Email marketers, marketing automation experts. Uh I have data scientists now that at higher levels of different companies who are big business to enterprise level that have needs for those. Some small businesses do if they're doing a lot of revenue, but they might not have as big of teams.

 

[05:15] Um and that's not as demanding of a position. You know, that's just interpreting simple data reports, feeding it into an AI most likely at this point, then getting paid for your ability to interpret all that data for somebody.

 

[05:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Chatbot Industry - ManyChat

 

NÚMEROS: Não aplicável

 

VISUAL: Destaque para chatbots como indústria própria, logo ou menção do ManyChat, exemplos de uso: lead generation, gamification, customer support

 

[05:32] To be clear, chatbots is its own industry. Now with ManyChat coming out, there is an entire industry just with people who have that one skill that service all these different kinds of business uh all different kinds of ways.

 

[05:48] Lead generation, gamifying a chatbot, uh just using it for support in a business, you know, helping out the support team with answering general questions.

 

[06:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Agency Business Models - Service x Industry Matrix

 

NÚMEROS: 3 modelos principais de negócio

 

VISUAL: Matriz ou diagrama mostrando diferentes combinações: 1 serviço + 1 indústria, múltiplos serviços + 1 indústria, 1 ou múltiplos serviços + qualquer indústria

 

[06:02] Any skill that you choose and any service that you choose when you are a digital agency, I just want to remind you you're either doing it for one industry with one service. You either have multiple services that you're doing towards one industry or you have one skill or multiple skills that you're doing on a general level for anybody.

 

[06:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Highest Paid Specialists - Niche Model

 

NÚMEROS: Não aplicável

 

VISUAL: Destaque visual para o modelo mais lucrativo: 1 serviço especializado + 1 indústria específica, representação de especialização máxima, ícones de experiência, conhecimento e conexões

 

[06:28] The people usually get the most paid are the people who offer one skill towards one industry because they'll likely be the most specialized out of everybody else. They'll have the most experience in that one industry. They'll have the most knowledge in that one industry and more importantly, they'll be the most connected and known most likely in that one industry with that one skill.

 

[06:55] I hope this helps you. I'll see you in the next video.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

6+ plataformas de anúncios pagos mencionadas (Pinterest, LinkedIn, Google AdWords, Google Display Network, Google PPC, YouTube, Facebook, Instagram)

3 modelos principais de negócio para agências digitais

Múltiplas categorias de serviços digitais (10+ diferentes)

Softwares mencionados: Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro X, Adobe Illustrator, After Effects, Photoshop, ManyChat

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

 

Modelo de Especialização por Indústria: Um serviço focado em uma indústria específica (maior pagamento)

Modelo Multi-Serviço Focado: Múltiplos serviços para uma indústria específica

Modelo Generalista: Um ou múltiplos serviços para qualquer indústria

Revenue Roles vs Time-Intensive Roles: Priorizar serviços orientados a resultados que não drenam tempo

Outsourcing Network: Construir rede de terceirização para escalar serviços intensivos em tempo

Piecemeal Specialization: Agências focando em partes específicas de processos maiores

AI Integration: Usar IA para interpretar dados e relatórios

Organic vs Paid Specialization: Escolher entre gestão orgânica ou anúncios pagos nas mesmas plataformas

 

ESTRUTURA:

 

Categorias de Serviços Digitais:

 

Design & Criativo:

Graphic Design (business cards, websites, YouTube thumbnails)

Adobe Photoshop, design de anúncios

 

Produção de Vídeo:

Video Editing

Production Agency

Softwares: Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro X, After Effects, Illustrator

 

Advertising (Paid):

Pinterest Ads

LinkedIn Ads

Google AdWords (Display Network + PPC/Search Network)

YouTube Ads

Facebook & Instagram Ads

 

Social Media (Organic):

Social Media Management

Content Creation

Content Posting

Reporting & Data Analysis

 

Marketing Especializado:

Email Marketing

Marketing Automation

Lead Generation

 

Dados & Análise:

Data Science

Data Interpretation

Reporting

 

Chatbots:

ManyChat Implementation

Lead Generation via Chatbot

Gamification

Customer Support Automation

 

Fotografia:

On-site Photography

Limited by location

 

Três Modelos de Negócio:

Modelo 1: 1 Serviço + 1 Indústria (MAIS LUCRATIVO)

Modelo 2: Múltiplos Serviços + 1 Indústria

Modelo 3: 1 ou Múltiplos Serviços + Qualquer Indústria

 

Vantagens da Especialização (1 Serviço + 1 Indústria):

Maior experiência na indústria

Maior conhecimento específico

Mais conexões no setor

Reconhecimento como especialista

Pagamentos mais altos

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Revenue Roles: Serviços que geram mais receita com menos tempo/esforço (ex: Advertising)

Time-Intensive Roles: Serviços limitados por tempo e localização (ex: Photography, Video Production)

Especialistas de Nicho: Recebem os maiores pagamentos por serem mais especializados

Custos Flutuantes: Diferentes serviços têm estruturas de custo variáveis

Enterprise Level: Data Scientists trabalham em níveis empresariais de grande receita

Small Business Market: Empresas pequenas com alta receita também precisam de certos serviços especializados

Outsourcing: Necessário para escalar serviços intensivos em tempo sem limitações

 

DURAÇÃO: ~7 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional com slides, apresentação de serviços e modelos de negócio para agências digitais
